'''Pinoora''' was a planet located into the [[Pinoora system/Legends|Pinoora system]] of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] sector between [[Torque]] and [[Selitan]]. It was located at the junction of the [[Pinooran Spur/Legends|Pinooran Spur]] and the [[Junction-Tierell Loop/Legends|Junction-Tierell Loop]] just north of the [[Denarii Nebula/Legends|Denarii Nebula]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> It served as one of the most strategic trade worlds in the Gordian Reach and was known as an active entertainment hub for spacers between [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jumps.

The planet was inhabited by hardy insects that were domesticated by [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists for their meat, eggs, and chitin, which could be used to make ceramics.<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
During the [[Yavin blockade|Blockade of Yavin]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] task force attacked [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] units stationed on the planet, to assist in the evacuation of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
While its location is placed in ''The Essential Atlas'', the name of the planet is not marked on the map for the Gordian Reach.
